en: If your company performs any of the following services and is required to maintain the relevant certification(s) for those services, you will be asked to provide your certificate in a subsequent form.

The Spain Activity License is an official municipal permit required for the lawful operation of most business premises and facilities in Spain. It serves to verify that commercial, industrial, or service activities comply with occupational health and safety, public health, urban planning, and environmental regulations before operations begin. Law 7 Local Government Act Law 20 Market Unity Guarantee Act

Is your company required to hold a Spain Activity License in accordance with Spanish local government regulations, applicable municipal activity ordinances, and national market-unity legislation, as administered by the corresponding city or municipal council?
By providing your electronic signature, you confirm that the information submitted in this questionnaire is true, complete, and accurate in accordance with Spain legislation.
